data.author: cottsay
data.message:
rqt_reconfigure: Re-write widget data flow

rqt_reconfigure is virtually unusable as is, and sends duplicate and unnecessary updates to the server frequently. This patch updates the PyQt widgets' structure to address many of the issues reported with rqt_reconfigure.

data.message:
Fix handling of namespaces in the node tree  (#132)

* Misc minor bugs, optimizations, and typos

* Fix handling of namespaces in the node tree

- Fix grouping of nodes by namespace
- Fix treenode removal; remove only the treenode that stopped running, and not
all nodes under its corresponding namespace
